_comment: EDIT THIS FILE ONLY to rebrand the entire website for a new client. Every page reads from here. See docs/CUSTOMIZATION.md.

business.name: Deep Auto Care
business.tagline: Dealership-quality repairs without the dealership price

whatsapp.presetMessage: Hi Deep Auto Care, I'd like to book a service.

hero.headline: Your car, handled by people who actually care.
hero.subheadline: Honest diagnostics, factory-grade parts, and a written warranty on every job. Book online in 60 seconds or call and talk to a real technician.

services.name: Oil & Filter Change
services.short: Synthetic and conventional oil changes with a complimentary multi-point inspection.
services.description: We use manufacturer-spec synthetic blends and OEM-grade filters, then run a free 30-point digital inspection so you leave knowing exactly where your vehicle stands.
benefits: In and out in under 45 minutes

services.name: Brake Repair
services.short: Pads, rotors, calipers and brake fluid service for safe, quiet stopping.
services.description: Squealing or soft pedal? We measure pad and rotor wear on a calibrated gauge, show you the readings, and only replace what's actually worn. Premium pads come with a lifetime warranty.

services.name: Transmission Service
services.short: Fluid flushes, diagnostics and rebuilds for automatic and manual transmissions.
services.description: Rough shifting or slipping gears caught early can save thousands. We diagnose with factory scan tools and recommend the least-invasive fix that solves the problem for good.

services.name: Engine Diagnostics
services.short: Check-engine light? We pinpoint the real cause, not just the code.
services.description: A trouble code is a starting point, not an answer. Our technicians trace the root cause with live data and pressure testing so you don't pay to replace parts that aren't broken.

services.name: Battery & Electrical
services.short: Testing, replacement and electrical fault-finding for hard starts and dead batteries.
services.description: We load-test your battery, alternator and starter together so you replace the part that's actually failing. Most batteries installed same day with disposal included.

services.name: Suspension & Steering
services.short: Shocks, struts, control arms and steering components for a smooth, safe ride.
services.description: Clunks, drifting or uneven tire wear usually trace back to worn suspension. We inspect the full system on the hoist and show you every component before recommending repairs.

services.name: Wheel Alignment
services.short: Precision laser alignment to extend tire life and fix pulling.
services.description: Our laser-guided alignment rack sets camber, caster and toe to factory spec. You get a printed before-and-after report every time.

services.name: Air Conditioning Repair
services.short: A/C recharge, leak detection and compressor service to keep you cool.
services.description: Blowing warm? We pressure-test the system, find leaks with UV dye, and recharge to spec using modern refrigerants. No guesswork, no top-ups that vanish in a week.

services.name: Tires & Seasonal Swaps
services.short: Sales, mounting, balancing and seasonal storage for every season.
services.description: All-season, winter and performance tires from major brands, mounted and road-force balanced. Ask about our off-season tire storage so your garage stays clear.

services.name: Fleet Maintenance
services.short: Priority scheduling and consolidated billing for business fleets.
services.description: Keep your vehicles earning. Fleet accounts get priority bays, preventative-maintenance tracking and one monthly invoice across your whole fleet.

services.name: Roadside Assistance
services.short: 24/7 jump-starts, lockouts and towing back to our shop.
services.description: Stuck on the side of the road? Our 24/7 line gets you a jump, a tow or a lockout rescue, and we'll bring the vehicle back to the shop for repair if needed.

whyChooseUs.title: Written warranty on everything
whyChooseUs.text: Every repair is backed by a 12-month / 20,000 km warranty, in writing, no fine-print surprises.

whyChooseUs.title: You see what we see
whyChooseUs.text: Free digital inspections with photos sent to your phone. We never recommend work we can't show you.

whyChooseUs.title: Up-front pricing
whyChooseUs.text: You approve a written estimate before we touch the car. No mystery charges at pickup.

whyChooseUs.title: Respect for your time
whyChooseUs.text: Same-day service on most jobs, free local shuttle, and loaner cars for bigger repairs.

whyChooseUs.title: Factory-grade everything
whyChooseUs.text: OEM and OEM-equivalent parts and factory scan tools, so your warranty stays intact.

whyChooseUs.title: Independent & local
whyChooseUs.text: Family-owned since 2008. You talk to the technician working on your car, not a call centre.

New brake rotors and pads installed

beforeAfter.alt: Seized, corroded caliper rebuilt to like-new

beforeAfter.title: Engine bay detail

reviews.name: Priya Sandhu
reviews.text: They sent me photos of my worn brakes before doing anything and the price matched the estimate to the dollar. First shop I actually trust.

reviews.name: Marcus Lee
reviews.text: Check-engine light had me terrified it was the transmission. Turned out to be a $40 sensor. Any other shop would've upsold me. Customers for life.

reviews.name: Danielle Roy
reviews.text: Booked online Sunday night, dropped off Monday morning, had my car back by lunch with a free shuttle ride to work. Effortless.

reviews.name: Tom Whitaker
reviews.text: Fair pricing on a European car, which is rare. Took an extra day waiting on a part but they kept me updated the whole time.

reviews.name: Aisha Khan
reviews.text: The digital inspection report is a game changer. Photos of everything, clear explanations, zero pressure. My dad's been going here for years and now I get why.

reviews.name: Greg Boucher
reviews.text: Roadside team jump-started me at 11pm and towed me in. Had me back on the road the next morning. Lifesavers.

faqs.q: Do you work on all makes and models?
faqs.a: Yes. Our technicians are trained across domestic, European and Asian brands, and we use factory-level scan tools so your manufacturer warranty stays intact.

faqs.q: Will servicing here void my new-car warranty?
faqs.a: No. Canadian law lets you service your vehicle at any licensed shop without voiding the manufacturer warranty, as long as factory-spec parts and procedures are used, which is exactly what we do.
Appointments get you priority and a guaranteed bay, and you can book online in about a minute. We also accept walk-ins for quick jobs like oil changes and battery tests when bays are open.
Every repair is covered for 12 months or 20,000 km, whichever comes first, in writing. If a covered repair fails, we make it right at no charge.

faqs.q: Can I get a quote before any work is done?
faqs.a: Always. We provide a written estimate and require your approval before starting. If we find something extra during the job, we call you first.
Yes, we partner with a financing provider for larger repairs so you can split the cost into manageable payments. Ask us for details at drop-off.

faqs.q: Do you provide a shuttle or loaner car?
faqs.a: We offer a free local shuttle, and loaner vehicles are available for repairs that keep your car overnight, subject to availability.

booking.successMessage: Thanks! Your request is in. We'll text or call you within one business hour to confirm your appointment.

seo.defaultTitle: Deep Auto Care | Trusted Auto Repair in Surrey, BC
seo.defaultDescription: Honest, warrantied auto repair in Surrey, BC. ASE-style certified technicians, free digital inspections and up-front pricing. Book online or call (604) 555-0123.
